title: Qiming Venture Partners Managing Partner Alex Zhou Named to 2026 Forbes Midas List
description: SHANGHAI, May 29, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Forbes has released its 2026 Midas List, the definitive ranking of the world's top venture capital investors. Alex Zhou, Managing Partner at Qiming Venture Partners, debuts at No. 80, recognizing his track record as a leading China-based investor focused on technology and artificial intelligence.

title: US Stock Market: Hawkish Fed voices grow louder amid energy-driven inflation surge
description: A growing split is seen among US Federal Reserve officials. Some policymakers warn that interest rates might need to increase again. This comes as inflation shows signs of not cooling down quickly enough. Rising energy prices linked to the Iran conflict are a major concern. The impact of artificial intelligence on productivity is also being debated.

title: How Anthropic hit $965bn valuation, overtaking OpenAI as world’s most valuable AI startup
description: Anthropic has become the world’s most valuable AI startup after raising $65 billion in fresh funding, pushing its valuation to nearly $965 billion. The Claude maker has now overtaken OpenAI as competition in the artificial intelligence industry heats up.
content:
The latest funding round included investments from major firms like Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks and Sequoia Capital. The jump is huge, even by Silicon Valley standards, and shows just how fast the AI race is moving.

title: SpaceX lowers IPO valuation target to at least $1.8 trillion
description: The rocket, data and artificial intelligence firm’s target is settling lower after aiming for a valuation above $2 trillion following consultations with advisers and investors, sources said.
content:
